project_identity.name: Yube1 Stays
project_identity.vibe: Organic Utility. Professional but grounded. Efficient but warm.

primary.name: Olive Drab
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key data highlights, sidebar active items

secondary.name: Pale Lemon
secondary.usage: Secondary backgrounds, highlights, 'light' state of primary

accent.name: Signal Yellow
accent.usage: Call to actions (secondary), alerts, performance badges, chart highlights

headings.usage: Page titles, card headers, metric values

layout_rules.spacing_system: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for main containers. Gap-6 for grids.
layout_rules.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar. Width 64 (256px). Dark Olive or White with Olive accents.

cards.style: Flat with subtle border. No heavy drop shadows.
cards.classes: bg-white border border-stone-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#556B2F] hover:bg-[#435425] text-white rounded-md px-6 py-2 shadow-sm font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F5C518] hover:bg-[#D4A017] text-black rounded-md px-6 py-2 shadow-sm font-medium

inputs.style: Clean, defined borders. Focus ring should be Olive.

charts.style: Minimalist. Remove grid lines if possible, or make them very subtle (strokeDasharray='3 3'). Use custom tooltips.

assets.icons: Lucide React (default). Use specific metaphors: 'Building' for properties, 'Users' for managers, 'PieChart' for reports.

login.layout: Split screen. Left: 40% Login Form (White). Right: 60% Image (Login BG) with Olive overlay (opacity-20).

dashboard_overview.layout: Bento Grid. Top row: KPI Cards (Total Beds, Occupancy %, Revenue). Middle row: Main Occupancy Chart (Line/Bar) + Property Leaderboard. Bottom row: Recent Activity / Alerts.
dashboard_overview.features: Filter by date range. Toggle between 'Daily' and 'Monthly' views.

occupancy_entry.layout: Data Grid / Table. List all 34 properties.
occupancy_entry.interaction: Inline editing or Modal entry. Input fields for 'Occupancy %'. Auto-save or Bulk Save button at bottom.
occupancy_entry.validation: 0-100% range check. Visual feedback (Green for >90%, Red for <50%).

reports.visuals: Consolidated Bar Charts (Property vs Occupancy). Pie Charts (Status breakdown).
reports.export: Add 'Export to CSV/PDF' button (UI only logic).

manager_performance.layout: Leaderboard Style. Rank managers by 'Overall Occupancy'.
manager_performance.cards: Individual Manager Cards showing: Name, Assigned Property, Lifetime Performance Score.

property_management.modal: Add/Edit Property Form (Name, Location, Total Beds, Assigned Manager).

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: npm install manrope inter (or import via Google Fonts in index.css).
CONFIG: Update tailwind.config.js to include the specific colors defined in theme_config.
OVERRIDE: Update index.css root variables to match the Olive/Yellow theme.
COMPONENT: Create a 'Layout' component that includes the Sidebar and Header.
COMPONENT: Create a 'StatCard' component for the dashboard KPIs.
STATE: Use context or simple state for Auth (Admin vs Cluster Manager). Mock the login flow.
DATA: Create a 'mockData.js' file with 34 properties and dummy occupancy data to populate the dashboard immediately.
CRITICAL: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
CRITICAL: Do not use default shadcn blue/slate colors. Force the Olive theme.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic AI design outputs. Use 'Organic Utility' vibe.
Dark colors only for text or specific accents, not gradients.
No generic centered layouts. Use grids.
